decision_rule: If there are clicked products without real affiliate links, replace those links first.
Before clicks exist, use next_link_target and then suggested_link_targets in order.
Keep cat safety notes and no-buy checks visible before pushing product links.

steps: Open the handoff page and create one real tracking URL for the current target.
Start catbot_first_link_wait_for_clipboard.bat before copying, or copy the tracking URL and run catbot_first_link_after_copy.bat.
Apply and publish with catbot_first_link_finish.bat -Apply -Publish only after the dry-run is correct.
